title: fraxinus caroliniana subsp. cubensis
intro: Fraxinus caroliniana subsp. cubensis, also known as Cuban ash, is a subspecies of the Carolina ash tree native to Cuba and surrounding islands. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus caroliniana subsp. cubensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and kill certain bacteria, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate fever, treat wounds, and reduce pain, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as diabetes and hypertension. Fraxinus caroliniana subsp. cubensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
